Name: Progressive Healing
Description: Casting this makes me feel all fuzzy inside!

Name: Progressive Fire
Description: If I was a pyromaniac I'd love this!

Name: Progressive Ice Storm
Description: Woah, now everything is super slippery!

Name: Progressive Thunder
Description: Isn't this Lightning?

Name: Progressive Diacute
Description: Double the damage, double the fun!

Name: Bayoen
Description: BAYOEEEN!  Why is everyone looking at me funny?

Name: Bayohihihiii
Description: Woah, a protective barrier formed around me!

Name: Braindumbed
Description: Is this some sort of kink spell?

Name: Jugem
Description: Welp, there goes all my mana!

Name: Revia
Description: Ha, try to hit me now, Chaos Witch!

Name: Ribbit Boots
Description: Wow I can jump now!  Wait I already could.  Nevermind.

Name: Magic King's Bracelet
Description: Summons a big ball!  Now what?

Name: Panotty's Flute
Description: Can play a nice little tune.  Could someone sing along?

Name: Magic Ribbon
Description: I can reach far enough thing now!  But why would I want that?

Name: Sukiyapodes' Hammer
Description: Would love to whack something with this...

Name: Magical Dictionary
Description: Literacy!  Wait I can already read...

Name: Toy Elephant
Description: Woah I'm suddenly really tiny, so cute!

Name: Secret Stone
Description: Glows with a strange power, perhaps to grant a wish.

Name: Dark Orb
Description: I can feel a dark fog holding this.  Strange.

Name: Elephant Statue's Head
Description: Some statue's head that got ripped off.  Okay...

Name: Light Orb
Description: I feel so warm and bright inside holding this.

Name: Ripe Cucumber
Description: Goes great in a salad!

Name: Dark Flower
Description: What a pretty flower.  When will it bloom though?

Name: Bazaar Pass
Description: What's this, is there some Bazaar nearby?

Name: Suketoudata's Terrorism
Description: 'I will blow up a cave now.', it says.  The hell?

Name: Firefly Egg
Description: What a small egg.  Something is moving inside.

Name: Mandrake's Leaf
Description: Never seen this kind of leaf before.

Name: Carbuncle
Description: What a strange crea- hey come back here!

Name: Flying Squirrel VIP Pass
Description: Free rides on squirrels?  Aren't they really tiny?

Name: Wanderlust
Description: Why do I feel like everything is stronger now?

Name: Scorpion's Wallet
Description: Why are people swarming me while I hold this?  Go away!

Description: Is someone getting married?
